Motion To To Quash Two Deposition Subpoenas For Business Records, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas I. Saberi, Esq. of Law Offices of William Payuntar, (650-588-2428 x 31), for Roy Shimek, Defendant and moving party.
Robert Smith, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-294-1465), for David Karner, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROY SHIMEK, PATRICIA SHIMEK, SHIMEK PROPERTIES LLC, CANADIAN-AMERICAN OIL COMPANY'S Motion To Quash Two Deposition Subpoenas For Business Records, And For Monetary Sanctions is Moot. Deposition subpoenas withdrawn after filing of this motion. Sanction granted in the amount of $1,260.00. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs ROY SHIMEK, PATRICIA SHIMEK, SHIMEK PROPERTIES LLC and CANADIAN-AMERICAN OIL COMPANY's Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint is DENIED. Defendants knew of the facts giving rise to cross-complaint since April 15, 2013. Trial was originally set for March 10, 2014 and currently set for June 16, 2014. Defendants may file this non-compulsory cross-complaint as a separate action. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)
